commands.repair_reason: - [P2] This member-authored draft needs maintainer security/product acceptance for the preview MXC provider; the minor docs issue is not the main merge blocker.; Needs attention: The diff is intentionally security-sensitive because it adds a preview sandbox provider with filesystem/network policy generation and opt-in host ACL mutation.; Review finding: [P3] Add target=windows to the shell-mode example — docs/provid... commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a built-in Windows `mxc` delegated-run provider with config/env/CLI flags, provider registration, docs, policy-generation tests, and an execution-backed doctor path.

Reproducibility: yes. for the minor review finding: the PR head source shows the provider targets Windows/native only while one docs command omits `--target windows`, so a default Linux config would be rejected before provider execution. I did not run a live Windows MXC host in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This member-authored draft needs maintainer security/product acceptance for the preview MXC provider; the minor docs issue is not the main merge blocker.
